water.name: Stewart Creek from its confluence with the Reese River to its headwaters

sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Stewart Creek from its confluence with the Reese River to its headwaters (Nye County): Open year around. Limits — No limit on trout. Hours: Any hour of the day or night.

sources.title: Stewart Creek — Nevada Department of Wildlife
sources.quotedText: Stewart Creek Region Southern County Nye Type of water Creek or Stream

sources.title: Lahontan Cutthroat Trout Species Management Plan for the Upper Humboldt River Drainage Basin — NDOW
sources.quotedText: The North and Middle Forks of Stewart Creek were occupied solely by Lahontan cutthroat trout in 1990; subsequent surveys found non-native brook trout had moved into these headwater reaches, and Stewart Creek is among the most heavily fished of the Reese River subbasin recovery streams.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

regulations.humanSummary: Stewart Creek from its confluence with the Reese River to its headwaters is open to fishing year-round.

parameters.counting_rule: No daily or possession limit on trout in this creek; anglers may keep any number of trout caught.

regulations.humanSummary: No limit on trout on Stewart Creek from its confluence with the Reese River to its headwaters.
Fishing is permitted any hour of the day or night on this reach of Stewart Creek.
regulations.verbatimText: Hours: Any hour of the day or night.

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older; no license required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
